test.create_query: CREATE TABLE dict_src_vector_path ( id UInt64, value UInt32, value_str String ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO dict_src_vector_path SELECT number AS id, (number % 10000) AS value, concat('value_', toString(number % 10000)) AS value_str FROM numbers(10000000);
CREATE DICTIONARY dict_vector_path ( id UInt64, value UInt32, value_str String ) PRIMARY KEY id SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(TABLE 'dict_src_vector_path')) LIFETIME(0) LAYOUT(HASHED());
